proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.
Patients with `treatment_7plus3=1` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients with `treatment_7plus3=0`.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z-test for objective_response by treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 22.0% with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs 16.6% without it; risk difference 5.4% (p=<1e-300).

analyses.method: Two-proportion z-test for objective_response by treatment_7plus3.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 18.9% with treatment_7plus3 vs 18.6% without it; risk difference 0.3% (p=0.458).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation=1` have higher mean `objective_response` than patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.
Patients with `tp53_mutation=1` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `tp53_mutation=0`.
Patients with `complex_karyotype=1` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 23.5% with npm1_mutation vs 16.7% without it.
Response was 16.6% with tp53_mutation vs 19.0% without it.
Response was 16.8% with complex_karyotype vs 19.1% without it.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ecog_ps=2` have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `ecog_ps=0`.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z-test comparing ecog_ps=2 with ecog_ps=0.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 12.9% for ecog_ps=2 vs 23.1% for ecog_ps=0; risk difference -10.2% (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher mean `objective_response`.

analyses.method: Univariate linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Per SD increase in weight_loss_pct_6mo, response changed by -2.0% (p=<1e-300).

analyses.method: Univariate linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Per SD increase in blast_pct_marrow, response changed by -1.4% (p=2.22e-16).

analyses.method: Univariate linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Per SD increase in albumin_g_dl, response changed by 0.9% (p=2.82e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.method: Univariate linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Per SD increase in wbc_k_per_ul, response changed by -0.7% (p=1.82e-4).

analyses.method: Univariate linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Per SD increase in crp_mg_l, response changed by -0.8% (p=6.04e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd=1`, `treatment_midostaurin=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_midostaurin=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within flt3_itd=1, response was 17.6% with midostaurin vs 19.1% without; risk difference -1.5%.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model with treatment, biomarker, interaction, other treatments, and clinical covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_midostaurin x flt3_itd interaction was -1.6% (p=0.199).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `flt3_itd=1`, `treatment_gilteritinib=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_gilteritinib=0`.
Among patients with `flt3_tkd=1`, `treatment_gilteritinib=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_gilteritinib=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within flt3_itd=1, response was 19.1% with gilteritinib vs 18.9% without.
Adjusted treatment_gilteritinib x flt3_itd interaction was 1.1% (p=0.374).
Within flt3_tkd=1, response was 15.1% with gilteritinib vs 18.6% without.
Adjusted treatment_gilteritinib x flt3_tkd interaction was -2.9% (p=0.165).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `idh1_mutation=1`, `treatment_ivosidenib=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_ivosidenib=0`.
Among patients with `idh2_mutation=1`, `treatment_enasidenib=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_enasidenib=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within idh1_mutation=1, response was 15.4% with ivosidenib vs 19.4% without.
Adjusted treatment_ivosidenib x idh1_mutation interaction was -4.4% (p=0.070).
Within idh2_mutation=1, response was 19.5% with enasidenib vs 19.1% without.
Adjusted treatment_enasidenib x idh2_mutation interaction was 0.4% (p=0.861).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x unfit_for_intensive interaction was 15.2% (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.
Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with lower mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within unfit_for_intensive=1, response was 30.8% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.3% without.
Within unfit_for_intensive=0, response was 16.0% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.8% without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation=1` than in patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x npm1_mutation interaction was 19.1% (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `npm1_mutation=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.
Among patients with `npm1_mutation=0`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with lower mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within npm1_mutation=1, response was 34.7% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.0% without.
Within npm1_mutation=0, response was 16.5% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.9% without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `tp53_mutation=1` than in patients with `tp53_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x tp53_mutation interaction was -6.8% (p=4.79e-9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `tp53_mutation=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with lower mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within tp53_mutation=1, response was 16.4% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.7% without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than in patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x complex_karyotype interaction was -5.1% (p=2.16e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `complex_karyotype=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Within complex_karyotype=1, response was 17.5% with venetoclax/azacitidine vs 16.3% without.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `secondary_aml=1` than in patients with `secondary_aml=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine x secondary_aml interaction was 0.4% (p=0.617).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_7plus3 x unfit_for_intensive interaction was -0.2% (p=0.779).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `age_years >= 70` than in patients with `age_years < 70`.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability interaction model using a derived age_years >= 70 subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_7plus3 x (age_years >= 70) interaction was -0.1% (p=0.858).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than in patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_7plus3 x complex_karyotype interaction was -3.2% (p=0.001).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for treatments, biomarkers, and clinical covariates, `secondary_aml=1` is associated with lower mean `objective_response` than `secondary_aml=0`.
After adjustment for treatments, biomarkers, and clinical covariates, higher `age_years` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted secondary_aml coefficient was 0.0% (p=0.913).
Adjusted age_years coefficient was -0.0% per year (p=0.652).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for treatments, biomarkers, and clinical covariates, `sex_female=1` is associated with higher mean `objective_response` than `sex_female=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted sex_female coefficient was 0.3% (p=0.354).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for treatments, biomarkers, and clinical covariates, a one-standard-deviation increase in `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower mean `objective_response`.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect scaled by one SD.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted per-SD ldh_u_l effect was -0.2% (p=0.383).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a combined multivariable model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction remains positive for `objective_response`.
In a combined multivariable model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` interaction remains positive for `objective_response`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted linear probability model with multiple venetoclax/azacitidine interactions.
analyses.result_summary: Combined-model venetoclax/azacitidine x unfit_for_intensive coefficient was 15.3% (p=<1e-300).

analyses.method: Combined adjusted linear probability model with multiple venetoclax/azacitidine interactions.
analyses.result_summary: Combined-model venetoclax/azacitidine x npm1_mutation coefficient was 19.2% (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a combined multivariable model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `tp53_mutation` interaction remains negative for `objective_response`.
In a combined multivariable model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `complex_karyotype` interaction remains negative for `objective_response`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted linear probability model with multiple venetoclax/azacitidine interactions.
analyses.result_summary: Combined-model venetoclax/azacitidine x tp53_mutation coefficient was -7.2% (p=4.56e-10).

analyses.method: Combined adjusted linear probability model with multiple venetoclax/azacitidine interactions.
analyses.result_summary: Combined-model venetoclax/azacitidine x complex_karyotype coefficient was -5.2% (p=1.00e-7).
